title: FMD - Both earbuds connected - Play button
scenario: Find My Device tone fails to play on both earbuds or map does not show Osprey device location in Lens app
steps: Open the Poly Lens app with the Osprey device connected.
Tap the HS card for Osprey.
expected: Osprey device shown on map; tone plays on both earbuds with flashing lights, "Sending tone..." message with animated stop button and illustration; after Stop, state returns to same as after step 4.
